description_long: This object is a classic, upright parking meter with a rounded, dome-shaped head and a long cylindrical post. The front face features a prominent display window with a mechanical dial, a coin slot, and a small red button or indicator below the display. The body is primarily a muted greenish-gray color, with metallic and glass elements visible on the display and coin slot. The back is smooth and unadorned, while the sides are narrow and show the thickness of the meter head. The mounting post is ribbed and metallic, securely supporting the main body for installation on sidewalks or curbs.
description: A classic upright parking meter with a rounded head, display window, coin slot, and a ribbed metallic post in muted greenish-gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display window, coin slot, and red button on the main face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and thickness of the meter head, with the red button slightly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unadorned back and the full length of the mounting post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the meter's thickness and the post.
attribute_payment_interface: Mechanical coin payment interface on the front face, with a coin slot and a red button below the display window.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front face, rectangular slot above the red button, with a metallic border.
attribute_mounting_post: Present; ribbed metallic cylindrical post extending from the base of the meter head, securely attached.
